scripts.verify:release: pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm build && pnpm smoke && pnpm test:examples && pnpm test:load && pnpm audit:source-safety && pnpm audit:public-api && pnpm audit:release-checksums && pnpm audit:packages
scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.smoke: pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-generator smoke && pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-evidence smoke && pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-evidence-typegraph smoke && pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-benchmark smoke && pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-node-smoke test && pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-worker-smoke test
